title: Web: sendKeys api + Keys d-pad + vertical scroll
action: Add sendKeys(paneId, keys[]) POSTing /api/panes/:pane/keys. In terminal.ts add a Keys button to the bottom bar that toggles a persistent d-pad overlay (up/down/left/right/enter/escape/tab + Close); each press calls sendKeys then poll(). Keep the Reply text sheet. Ensure the viewport scrolls vertically through the recent buffer.

truths: Keys button opens a d-pad that sends arrow/enter/esc/tab keys
after a key press the screen re-polls
viewport scrolls vertically to reach earlier lines
prohibitions: Do not break the existing reply flow

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Web: sendKeys api + Keys d-pad (arrows/enter/esc/tab) + fixed-position terminal view so recent history scrolls internally
trace.verify_output: bundle ok; vitest 15 passed. Browser (iPhone14 emu): Keys d-pad sends down/enter (fake screen gains <down>); viewport canScroll=true (clientH 783 < scrollH 1254), scroll-to-top reveals earliest lines; Reply still opens with submit checkbox off.
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
